violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Handwashing sink in dishwashing area was not accessible.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Ice container was in sink.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. - Hand wash station by dishwash station being used as a dump station.
Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, - Coats hung on dry goods.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during the mechanical warewashing operation. - Dishwasher found at 0ppm CL
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
